channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [KAYNES] Kaynes Tech FY26 Revenue Up 33% YoY to ₹36,264 Mn
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Kaynes Technology India Ltd reported audited consolidated financial results for Q4 and FY26. FY26 revenue reached ₹36,264 million, a 33% YoY increase, with EBITDA at ₹5,741 million, up 40% YoY. The company's order book stood at over ₹80,000 million. The OSAT facility in Sanand, Gujarat, commenced commercial operations. Padma Shri Dr. M. Annadurai and Mr. Rajesh Mittal were appointed as Independent Directors.

  • Kaynes Tech's FY26 revenue grew 33% YoY to ₹36,264 million.
  • FY26 EBITDA increased by 40% YoY to ₹5,741 million.
  • The company's order book exceeds ₹80,000 million as of FY26.
  • OSAT facility in Sanand, Gujarat, has commenced commercial operations.
  • Padma Shri Dr. M. Annadurai and Mr. Rajesh Mittal appointed as Independent Directors.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Kaynes Technology India Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [SAGCEM] Sagar Cements FY26: Revenue ₹2,65,002 Lakhs, EBITDA ₹29,199 Lakhs
item.description:
Sagar Cements Ltd announced its audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the fourth quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The company's revenue for FY26 stood at ₹2,65,002 Lakhs, reflecting a 17% increase. EBITDA reached ₹29,199 Lakhs, marking a 107% rise. Sales volume increased by 11% to 60,99,386 MT. For Q4 FY26, revenue was ₹787 Crore, a 20% YoY increase, with sales volume at 1.83 MnT, up 8% YoY.

  • FY26 revenue increased by 17% to ₹2,65,002 Lakhs.
  • FY26 EBITDA rose by 107% to ₹29,199 Lakhs.
  • Q4 FY26 revenue grew by 20% YoY to ₹787 Crore.
  • Q4 FY26 sales volume increased by 8% YoY to 1.83 MnT.
  • Focus on green power usage increased by 400bps to 18%.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SAGAR CEMENTS LTD.-$ | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [LICHSGFIN] LIC Housing Finance FY26 PAT up 3% to ₹5595.15 Cr
item.description:
🔥 Trending

LIC Housing Finance Ltd announced its FY2026 results with a 3% increase in Profit After Tax (PAT) to ₹5595.15 Cr. The Board of Directors approved these standalone audited results on May 13, 2026. Total disbursements for FY26 stood at ₹66544 crs, up by 4%. The board also proposed a dividend of 500%.

  • Q4 FY26 PAT increased by 9% to ₹1497.41 Cr.
  • Total disbursements in Q4 FY26 were up by 10% at ₹21019 crs.
  • Net Interest Margin for Q4FY26 stood at 2.80%.
  • FY26 total disbursements increased by 4% to ₹66544 crs.
  • Board proposes a dividend of 500%.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: LIC HOUSING FINANCE LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [OLAELEC] Ola Electric Board Meeting on May 18, 2026 to Approve Financial Results
item.description:
Ola Electric Mobility Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 18, 2026, to consider and approve the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the fourth quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. This information was disclosed to the BSE under Regulation 29 of the SEBI Listing Regulations.

  • Ola Electric board meeting set for May 18, 2026.
  • Agenda includes approval of audited financial results.
  • Results are for Q4 and FY ended March 31, 2026.
  • Disclosure made under SEBI Listing Regulations.
  • Information will be available on www.olaelectric.com.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Ola Electric Mobility Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [SMARTLINK] Smartlink Holdings Re-appoints Marathe Rao & Swarup as Internal Auditors
item.description:
Smartlink Holdings Ltd's Board of Directors re-appointed M/s Marathe Rao & Swarup, Chartered Accountants, as internal auditors for the financial year 2026-27, based on the recommendation of the Audit Committee. This decision was made during the board meeting held on May 13, 2026, where the board also approved audited financial results, recommended a final dividend of ₹ 2.00 per share, and appointed Ms. Arati Naik as an Executive Director, subject to shareholder approval. The board also approved the appointment of M S K A & Associates LLP as the Statutory Auditors of the Company.

  • M/s Marathe Rao & Swarup re-appointed as internal auditors for FY 2026-27.
  • Board approved audited financial results for the year ended March 31, 2026.
  • Final dividend of ₹ 2.00 per share recommended for FY 2026.
  • M S K A & Associates LLP appointed as Statutory Auditors, subject to member approval.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Smartlink Holdings Ltd | Category: Auditor

item.title: [KAYNES] Kaynes Tech Approves FY26 Audited Results, Director Reappointments
item.description:
Kaynes Technology India Ltd's Board approved audited financial results (standalone and consolidated) for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The board also approved the re-appointment of Mr. Alexander Koshy and Ms. Poornima Ranganath as Independent Directors, and Mr. Jairam Paravastu Sampath as a Whole-time Director, subject to shareholder approval. Additionally, Mr. Rajesh Balkrishna Mittal and Mr. Annadurai Mylswamy were appointed as Additional Non-Executive Independent Directors. Messrs. GA Associates were appointed as Cost Auditor for FY 2026-27.

  • Audited financial results (standalone and consolidated) for FY26 approved with unmodified audit opinion.
  • Alexander Koshy re-appointed as Independent Director for a second term effective February 21, 2027, subject to shareholder approval.
  • Poornima Ranganath re-appointed as Independent Director for a second term effective March 31, 2027, subject to shareholder approval.
  • Jairam Paravastu Sampath appointed as Whole-time Director for 5 years effective April 1, 2027, subject to shareholder approval.
  • Rajesh Balkrishna Mittal and Annadurai Mylswamy appointed as Additional Non-Executive Independent Directors effective May 13, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Kaynes Technology India Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [EXPLEOSOL] Expleo Solutions Q4FY26 Total Income Up 14.8% Y-o-Y to ₹2,989 Mn
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Expleo Solutions Ltd announced its Q4 and full year FY26 results, reporting a 14.8% year-on-year increase in total income to ₹2,989 million. The company highlighted strong operational performance, driven by AI initiatives and digital transformation. Mr. Phani Tangirala, Managing Director & CEO, expressed optimism about future growth, emphasizing disciplined execution and strategic investments. The company's website, https://investors.expleo.com, provides further details on the results.

  • Q4FY26 operating revenue grew by 11.9% Y-o-Y to ₹2,863 million.
  • Q4FY26 profit after tax including OCI increased 2.1 times Y-o-Y to ₹493 million.
  • FY26 total income increased by 10.1% Y-o-Y to ₹11,459 million.
  • Basic EPS for Q4FY26 stood at ₹26.85, reflecting a 73.1% Y-o-Y growth.
  • The company's net cash position stood at ₹3,757 million in Q4FY26.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Expleo Solutions Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [DIGISPICE] Digispice Technologies Ltd Results for FY26
item.description:
Digispice Technologies Ltd. announced the audited financial results (standalone and consolidated) for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The results were approved by the Board of Directors in their meeting held on May 13, 2026, following a review by the Audit Committee. S. R. Batliboi & Co. LLP, Chartered Accountants, issued unmodified audit opinions on the standalone and consolidated financial results. The Board Meeting commenced at 15:00 hours (IST) and concluded at 20:00 hours (IST).

  • Audited financial results for Q4 and FY26 approved.
  • Audit Committee reviewed the financial results.
  • S. R. Batliboi & Co. LLP issued unmodified audit opinions.
  • Board meeting held on May 13, 2026, to approve results.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Digispice Technologies Ltd-$ | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [DIGISPICE] Digispice Tech Authorizes KMPs for LODR Compliance
item.description:
Digispice Technologies Ltd. has authorized key management personnel (KMPs) to determine the materiality of events and make disclosures to stock exchanges under the Listing Regulations, effective May 13, 2026. This authorization supersedes any previous authorizations. The authorized KMPs are Mr. Sanjeev Kumar, Chief Financial Officer (interim), and Mr. Pankaj Arora, Company Secretary and Compliance Officer. Their contact information, including email addresses and phone number, has been provided to facilitate communication.

  • Digispice Technologies authorizes KMPs for LODR compliance.
  • Sanjeev Kumar (Interim CFO) and Pankaj Arora (CS) are authorized.
  • Authorization is effective from May 13, 2026.
  • KMPs will determine event materiality and make disclosures.
  • This authorization supersedes earlier authorizations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Digispice Technologies Ltd-$ | Category: Regulatory

item.title: [DIGISPICE] Digispice Technologies Reconstitutes Stakeholders Relationship Committee
item.description:
Digispice Technologies Ltd. has reconstituted its Stakeholders Relationship Committee (SRC) to comply with the Companies Act, 2013 and SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The reconstituted committee includes Mr. Ram Nirankar Rastogi, Mr. Pankaj Vaish, and Mr. Mrutyunjay Mahapatra. The decision was made during a Board of Directors meeting held on May 13, 2026, which commenced at 15:00 hours (IST) and concluded at 20:00 hours (IST).

  • Digispice Technologies reconstitutes Stakeholders Relationship Committee.
  • Reconstitution to meet Companies Act, 2013 and SEBI regulations.
  • Committee members: Ram Nirankar Rastogi, Pankaj Vaish, Mrutyunjay Mahapatra.
  • Decision made at Board meeting on May 13, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Digispice Technologies Ltd-$ | Category: Corporate Governance
